purpose: T2: stage and launch Salt 2 Jin hiins/loins true-steady insulation runs from the nominal continuation.
scope: Salt 2 Jin only (conservative start). External wall h knob on 32 passive rcExternalTemperature segments. endTime=33000 s (~5 tau_ext past restart t=7915 s).
admissibility_gate: Runs are inadmissible until mdot moves off nominal (-0.0132 kg/s) and re-plateaus AND wall dT differs from nominal. Apply T3 gate (AGENT-166) before extracting closures.
open_questions_for_user: Confirm insulation naming convention: hiins=LOWER h (more insulation) is correct per user instruction 2026-07-01.
